topic: ChatGPT prompting strategies and real-world use cases

entries.a: A curated collection of prompt examples for AI chat models.

entries.q: What AI models are supported by prompts.chat?
entries.a: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Mistral, and more.

entries.q: How can I contribute to prompts.chat?
entries.a: Add prompts at prompts.chat/prompts/new — they sync automatically.

entries.q: What is the Interactive Book of Prompting?
entries.a: A free, interactive guide covering everything from basics to advanced techniques like chain-of-thought reasoning and few-shot learning.
An interactive, game-based adventure to teach children (ages 8-14) how to communicate with AI through fun puzzles and stories.

entries.q: Can I self-host my own private prompt library?
entries.a: Yes, deploy your own private prompt library with custom branding, themes, and authentication using prompts.chat.

entries.q: What integrations are available for prompts.chat?
entries.a: CLI, Claude Code Plugin, and MCP Server integrations are available.

entries.q: What is the purpose of the prompts.chat project?
entries.a: To provide a large open-source prompt library for AI chat models, making it easier for users to interact with AI assistants.
